issues.description: First effect has wrong trigger: should be a passive effect during opponent's turn, not OnAttacked. The '[Opponent's Turn]' text indicates duration, not a trigger.
First effect missing the KO protection: 'This Character cannot be K.O.'d by your opponent's effects' is completely absent from DSL
First effect has wrong duration: '[Opponent's Turn]' requires duration 'DuringOpponentTurn', not 'EndOfTurn'
Second effect has wrong trigger: '[End of Your Turn]' should be 'EndOfTurn' trigger, not 'Activated'
Second effect is missing the cost of resting 1 DON!! card. Only trash from hand is present, but resting DON is also required.
Second effect is missing the main action: 'Set this Character as active' (unrest/activate self) is not present in DSL
Second effect should be optional ('You may'), but there's no condition or optional flag indicated
